message:
feat: add bd remember/memories/forget/recall for persistent agent memory

Replaces Claude Code filesystem-based auto-memory (MEMORY.md) with
bead-backed semantic memory using the existing k/v store.

New commands:
- bd remember insight [--key slug] - store a memory (auto-generates key)
- bd memories [search] - list/search memories by keyword
- bd recall key - retrieve full content of a memory
- bd forget key - remove a memory

Storage: k/v store with memory. key prefix (config table). No new schema.

Prime-time injection: bd prime now appends memories to its output, so
agents receive their memories automatically at session start. Supports
both MCP (compact) and CLI (full) formats.

Fixes: gt-tit8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
